0.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the right lung upper lobe anterior segment

1.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the right lung lower lobe superior and mediobasal segments

2.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities peripherally in the right lung lower lobe superior segment

3.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the left lung lower lobe laterobasal segment

4.text: Bilateral patchy ground glass opacities in the left lung upper lobe anterior segment

5.text: Increased consolidation at the center of ground glass opacity in the paramediastinal location of the right lower lobe's superior and mediobasal segments

6.text: Stable peripheral patchy ground glass opacities in both lungs
